authorization_phrase_detected: YES start P183 controlled DB migration rehearsal plan only

part_a_db_split_summary.p182_backport_scope: code/docs/tests only — no DB write performed
part_a_db_split_summary.critical_schema_finding: UNIQUE constraint changed across the split: main uses replay_run_id; zen-gates uses bet_index. ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN is insufficient — table recreation required.

part_b_rehearsal_plan.plan_name: Controlled DB Migration Rehearsal Plan (P184 design)
part_b_rehearsal_plan.target: main DB: 54462 rows / no bet_index → zen-gates equivalent: 94924 rows / bet_index PRESENT
part_b_rehearsal_plan.authorization_required_for_execution: YES start P184 controlled DB migration rehearsal on temp copy only

step_1_preflight_checks.name: Pre-flight verification
actions: sqlite3 lottery_api/data/lottery_v2.db 'SELECT COUNT(*) FROM strategy_prediction_replays;' → expect 54462
Confirm bet_index ABSENT via PRAGMA table_info
Confirm UNIQUE constraint = (lottery_type, target_draw, strategy_id, replay_run_id)
Confirm drift guard PASS before migration
Confirm git status has no unstaged DB file changes that would be lost
step_1_preflight_checks.stop_if: Any count mismatch or dirty DB state

step_2_immutable_backup.name: Immutable DB backup
actions: Verify backup file size matches original
step_2_immutable_backup.note: Backup must be immutable before ANY migration step proceeds. No migration without confirmed backup.
step_2_immutable_backup.stop_if: Backup size mismatch or backup unreadable

step_3_temp_copy_design.name: Temp rehearsal DB path design
actions: ALL migration steps execute ONLY against <temp_db_path>
Production DB (lottery_api/data/lottery_v2.db) must NOT be opened for write during rehearsal
Rehearsal uses: sqlite3 <temp_db_path> 'PRAGMA query_only=OFF;' — temp only
step_3_temp_copy_design.note: Rehearsal isolation: temp copy absorbs all migration risk. Production DB remains read-only throughout.

step_4_schema_migration_design.name: Schema migration: add bet_index + change UNIQUE constraint
step_4_schema_migration_design.critical_finding: ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN bet_index is insufficient because the UNIQUE constraint must change from (lottery_type, target_draw, strategy_id, replay_run_id) to (lottery_type, target_draw, strategy_id, bet_index). SQLite does not support DROP CONSTRAINT. Full table recreation required.
safe_migration_sequence: 1. CREATE TABLE strategy_prediction_replays_new (... bet_index INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, UNIQUE(lottery_type, target_draw, strategy_id, bet_index), ...)
2. INSERT INTO strategy_prediction_replays_new SELECT ..., 1 as bet_index FROM strategy_prediction_replays
5. ALTER TABLE strategy_prediction_replays_new RENAME TO strategy_prediction_replays
step_4_schema_migration_design.step_2_bet_index_default: All existing rows get bet_index=1 (single-bet rows; this is correct for pre-multi-bet data)
step_4_schema_migration_design.uniqueness_risk: If any (lottery_type, target_draw, strategy_id) combination appears more than once with the same replay_run_id but different rows, they will collide on (lottery_type, target_draw, strategy_id, bet_index=1). Rehearsal must verify this before proceeding.
step_4_schema_migration_design.duplicate_check_query: SELECT lottery_type, target_draw, strategy_id, COUNT(*) FROM strategy_prediction_replays GROUP BY lottery_type, target_draw, strategy_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;

step_5_row_delta_reconciliation_design.name: Row delta reconciliation: insert 40462 missing multi-bet rows
step_5_row_delta_reconciliation_design.source: zen-gates DB (read-only) — copy only rows with bet_index > 1 that do not exist in migrated main DB
approach: 1. Attach zen-gates DB as read-only: ATTACH 'file:<zen_gates_db>?mode=ro' AS zg
2. Identify missing rows: SELECT * FROM zg.strategy_prediction_replays WHERE bet_index > 1
3. Verify no overlap with existing main rows
4. INSERT OR IGNORE multi-bet rows into temp rehearsal DB
step_5_row_delta_reconciliation_design.note: INSERT must go into temp rehearsal DB only. Never into production DB in P184.

step_6_duplicate_uniqueness_guard.name: Duplicate / uniqueness verification
queries: SELECT lottery_type, target_draw, strategy_id, bet_index, COUNT(*) FROM strategy_prediction_replays GROUP BY lottery_type, target_draw, strategy_id, bet_index HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
step_6_duplicate_uniqueness_guard.action_if_duplicates_found: STOP migration. Document duplicates. Determine resolution strategy before re-running.

step_7_provenance_preservation.name: Provenance and controlled_apply_id preservation check
actions: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM strategy_prediction_replays WHERE controlled_apply_id IS NOT NULL; → compare before/after
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM strategy_prediction_replays WHERE provenance_hash IS NOT NULL; → compare before/after
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM strategy_prediction_replays WHERE source IS NOT NULL; → compare before/after
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM strategy_prediction_replays WHERE truth_level IS NOT NULL; → compare before/after
step_7_provenance_preservation.acceptance: All provenance counts must match pre-migration values exactly

step_8_drift_guard_adaptation.name: replay_lifecycle_drift_guard adaptation for post-migration state
step_8_drift_guard_adaptation.required_update: scripts/replay_lifecycle_drift_guard.py row count guard must be updated from 54462 to 94924 AFTER migration is complete and verified. This update requires separate authorization.
step_8_drift_guard_adaptation.note: Do NOT update drift guard before migration is complete. Guard must flag mismatch as STOP condition until migration is verified.

step_9_rollback_plan.name: Rollback plan
trigger_conditions: Any test contract that was previously PASS now FAIL
rollback_procedure: 1. STOP immediately — do not proceed with more migration steps
3. Restore from immutable backup: cp <backup> lottery_api/data/lottery_v2.db
4. Verify restored DB: SELECT COUNT(*) → expect 54462
5. Run drift guard → expect PASS at 54462
6. Document failure in P184 artifact and STOP
step_9_rollback_plan.production_db_safety: Production DB is never written during rehearsal. Rollback is instantaneous — restore from backup.

step_10_post_rehearsal_acceptance.name: Post-rehearsal acceptance criteria
criteria: bet_index column present, NOT NULL DEFAULT 1
P161 analysis script runs successfully against rehearsal DB
Drift guard (if adapted) shows PASS at 94924
No rows in temp DB that are not in zen-gates DB or main DB
step_10_post_rehearsal_acceptance.report: P184 must produce a rehearsal report documenting each criterion pass/fail

step_11_production_migration_authorizati.name: Final production migration authorization chain
required_before_production_migration: P184 temp-copy rehearsal completes with all 10 acceptance criteria PASS
P184 rehearsal report reviewed by CEO
Immutable backup confirmed present and readable
Explicit CEO authorization phrase provided for production migration step
All P161-P182 DB-dependent contract tests verified against rehearsal DB
step_11_production_migration_authorizati.production_migration_phrase_template: YES start P185 production DB migration execution authorized — backup confirmed — rehearsal passed
step_11_production_migration_authorizati.note: Production migration is a separate P185 (or later) task. P184 is rehearsal only.

part_c_schema_migration_design.reason: SQLite does not support DROP CONSTRAINT. The UNIQUE constraint change from replay_run_id-based to bet_index-based requires full table recreation via CREATE TABLE ... AS SELECT / RENAME pattern.
part_c_schema_migration_design.risk: Table recreation is atomic within a transaction but requires sufficient disk space for both old and new table simultaneously.

delta_source_assumptions.p128_migration_bet_index_schema: P128 designed the bet_index schema and migration plan. The bet_index column and UNIQUE constraint change were defined here.
delta_source_assumptions.p126_tier_b_multi_bet: P126 identified 5 Tier-B controlled_apply candidates generating multi-bet rows (bet_index 2-5). These are the primary source of delta rows.
delta_source_assumptions.p130_to_p135_replay_expansion: P130-P135 replay expansion chain likely added additional multi-bet rows via controlled_apply execution.
delta_source_assumptions.p149_to_p159b_replay_product_chain: P149-P159B replay product chain effects — provenance fields, lifecycle labels, truth_level assignments — contributed to the 94924 state.
delta_source_assumptions.p161_to_p181_research_artifacts: P161-P181 are code/docs/tests artifacts only. They do not directly add DB rows. The DB was already at 94924 before P161.
delta_source_assumptions.exact_breakdown: UNKNOWN / REQUIRES_P184_REHEARSAL_AUDIT — precise per-task row attribution requires P184 rehearsal audit of controlled_apply_id, source, and provenance_hash fields.

delta_verification_queries: SELECT source, COUNT(*) FROM strategy_prediction_replays WHERE bet_index > 1 GROUP BY source; -- zen-gates only
SELECT controlled_apply_id, COUNT(*) FROM strategy_prediction_replays WHERE bet_index > 1 GROUP BY controlled_apply_id; -- zen-gates only
SELECT lottery_type, bet_index, COUNT(*) FROM strategy_prediction_replays GROUP BY lottery_type, bet_index; -- zen-gates only

schema_mismatch_risk.description: UNIQUE constraint change (replay_run_id→bet_index) requires table recreation. Any error in recreation DDL corrupts the table. Must be wrapped in a transaction with immediate rollback on error.

row_count_drift_risk.description: If INSERT from zen-gates misses rows or inserts duplicates, final count will not equal 94924. Drift guard will flag STOP until guard is updated.

duplicate_key_risk.description: Existing main rows may have (lottery_type, target_draw, strategy_id) combinations that are not unique when bet_index=1 is applied to all. Must be verified before table recreation.

old_main_constraints_vs_zen_gates.description: Main uses replay_run_id uniqueness; zen-gates uses bet_index uniqueness. After migration, any code or test that enforces replay_run_id uniqueness will be semantically broken. All such code must be identified before production migration.

stale_tests_vs_migrated_db.description: P161-P182 contract tests were written for zen-gates DB (94924 rows, bet_index). After main DB migration, DB-dependent tests currently marked requires_zen_gates_db should PASS instead of SKIP. Conftest markers may need updating.

backup_rollback_risk.description: If backup was created correctly (immutable, verified), rollback is instantaneous. Risk is that backup was not created before migration begins.

accidental_production_db_write_risk.description: All migration steps must target temp_db only. Production DB must be opened with PRAGMA query_only=ON during rehearsal to enforce read-only. Any accidental write to production DB is irreversible without the backup.

part_f_p184_authorization_options.phrase: YES start P184 controlled DB migration rehearsal on temp copy only
part_f_p184_authorization_options.effect: Execute all 11 rehearsal steps against a temp copy of main DB. No production DB write. Produces rehearsal report.

part_f_p184_authorization_options.phrase: YES start P184 DB migration preflight audit only
part_f_p184_authorization_options.effect: Run read-only preflight checks only (steps 1, 6, 7). No migration, no backup, no schema change. Produces preflight report.

part_f_p184_authorization_options.phrase: YES start P184 replay product UI backlog implementation plan only
part_f_p184_authorization_options.effect: Plan for multi-bet display (Bet 1-5), bet_index filter, lifecycle tooltips in replay UI. No DB migration.

part_f_p184_authorization_options.phrase: YES start P184 maintain documented divergence and pause DB migration
part_f_p184_authorization_options.effect: Accept main/zen-gates split. No migration. Document reasons for deferral.

part_f_p184_authorization_options.phrase: YES start P184 production DB migration authorization gate only
part_f_p184_authorization_options.effect: Define exact authorization phrase and checklist for future production migration. No execution.

part_g_cto_recommendation.primary: YES start P184 controlled DB migration rehearsal on temp copy only
part_g_cto_recommendation.rationale: The schema change (UNIQUE constraint) is non-trivial and requires verified table recreation. A temp-copy rehearsal is mandatory before any production migration. The 40462 row delta provenance is UNKNOWN and must be audited in rehearsal.
do_not: Do not perform production DB migration in P184
Do not copy zen-gates DB file over main DB (destroys P149-P159B production chain)
Do not reopen POWER_LOTTO research (P178A closure active)
Production migration only after: rehearsal PASS + backup confirmed + exact CEO authorization phrase
